bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no real time pressure, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid rather than conceding immediately. The opponent’s first offer gives me the lowest valid value on every issue, and their urgency message is cheap talk this early, so I will counter with my strongest valid package.

I am targeting a very high utility because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02, so there is no real deadline pressure despite the opponent’s urgency messages. The opponent has repeated the same all-valueE offer, which is the lowest utility to me and shows no concession yet, so I will make only a small concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.94 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only slightly improved their offer on issueA while keeping the rest at my worst values, and their urgency messages are not supported by the actual time fraction. I am conceding first on lower-weight issues D and E while holding firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.94 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have only improved slightly for me, from all valueE to issueA:valueD with the rest valueE, and their urgency messages are not supported by the actual early time fraction. I will avoid repeating my last exact bid while keeping my high-weight issues strong and only varying concessions on lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early (t=0.08), so there is no need to accept the opponent’s low-utility offers or their fake urgency messages. The opponent has made only small concessions and remains near all valueE, so I will concede only on my lowest-weight issues D and E while holding firm on the more important A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.88 because it is still very early at t=0.10, so there is no need to accept the opponent’s low-utility bids despite their urgency messages. The opponent has made only small concessions, with my utility from their latest offer still low, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding on lower-weight issues D and E. This bid avoids repeating my previous exact offer while keeping a reasonable early concession pattern.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility because it is still very early, so there is no need to accept the opponent’s low-utility offers yet. The opponent has made only small concessions so far, with their latest bid worth about 0.32 to me, while their repeated urgency messages are not credible at t=0.12. I will continue conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to accept the opponent’s very low offers yet. The opponent has made small concessions mainly on issueA/issueB but is still offering low utility to me, while their urgency messages look like cheap-talk pressure rather than real deadline evidence. I will keep my highest-weight issues issueA and issueB at valueA and concede more on lower-weight issueE and issueD.

I am targeting a strong early-game utility of about 0.84, since t=0.16 is still early and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s latest valid offer improved on issueA but remains very unfavorable on issueB–issueE; their urgency messages are cheap talk and not supported by the actual time fraction. I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding the lower-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.80 because the negotiation is early at t=0.18, so there is no need to accept the opponent’s low-utility offers yet. The opponent’s bids have improved only modestly for me and their urgency messages look like cheap-talk pressure, but they consistently push issueC/issueD/issueE toward valueE, so I concede mainly on lower and mid-weight issues while holding firm on high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting about 0.76 utility, which is still strong for me while making a visible concession from my prior high-utility offers. At t=0.20 there is no real deadline pressure yet despite the opponent’s repeated urgency messages, but their offers have improved from all valueE to partial movement on issueA and issueB, so I will hold firm on the highest-weight issues while conceding more on lower/medium ones.

At t=0.22 it is still early enough to target a strong utility around 0.80 rather than accept the opponent’s low-utility offers, though their bids show some limited concession on issueA and issueB. I am holding firm on the high-weight issues A and B, while conceding the low-weight issues D and E to valueE and offering a moderate concession on issueC to keep progress moving despite the opponent’s urgency messages being cheap talk.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 while making a visible concession on the lower-weight issueC and keeping my most important issues, issueA and issueB, at valueA. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and their urgency messages are cheap talk at only t=0.24, but they have shown some movement on issueA/issueB while mostly holding issueD/issueE near valueE, so I concede there first and avoid repeating my immediately previous bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.80, holding firm on the high-weight issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight D and E. This bid improves acceptability by giving valueE on the least important issues while preserving strong value on my core issues.

I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.78, since we are only at t=0.28 and there is no need to accept the opponent’s very low-utility offers yet. I will hold firm on issueA and issueB because they are my highest-weight issues, while offering valueD/valueE concessions elsewhere.

I targeted about 0.66 utility, holding firm on the high-weight issues A and B while conceding heavily on lower-weight C and D and using the opponent’s recent issueE=valueC signal. I am targeting a utility around 0.74: still strong for me, but with meaningful concessions on lower-weight issues and a moderate concession on issueB. I am targeting a utility around 0.71, conceding moderately because we are in the mid-game but not yet near the deadline. I am targeting a utility around 0.66, conceding moderately because we are near the middle of the negotiation but not yet under true deadline pressure. I am targeting about 0.66 utility, keeping one of the two highest-weight issues at my top value while conceding on the other high-weight issue and on low-weight issues. At t=0.48 this is mid-negotiation, so I should move toward combinations the opponent has actually signaled—such as issueA=valueC, issueB=valueA, issueC=valueC, and low-weight concessions—while not overreacting to their repeated urgency messages. The opponent’s offers remain low for me overall, but they have shown willingness to give valueA/valueC on some important issues, so this bid tests a feasible tradeoff without dropping too far.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.68, conceding mostly on lower-weight issues and partially on issueA while holding issueB at my top value. I am targeting about 0.68 utility, which is a moderate mid-game concession while still protecting the more important issues A, B, and C. The opponent’s urgency messages are repetitive cheap talk, and their offers have only intermittently improved for me, with the latest offer regressing, so I am making a constructive but not overly large concession. This bid avoids repeating my last offer and gives ground on the lower-weight issues D and E while moving A and B to valueB as a plausible compromise.
